title: DOQAUS Meat Thermometers, 3S Instant Read Food Thermometer, Accurate Meat Thermometer Probe With Backlight, Foldable Long Probe, Auto On/Off, Cooking Thermometers for Kitchen, BBQ, Water, Milk(Black)
features: Ultra Fast & Precise Temperature Reading: DOQAUS digital meat thermometer provides fast and highly accurate internal temperature measurements, allowing you to get temperature in a little as 3 seconds, and is accurate to ±1 degree. With a Hold button, no more lingering near the heat to read the current temperature. This food thermometer is an ideal tool for cooking enthusiasts and home chefs alik

Sensitive Foldable Long Probe & Backlight: Made of high quality 304 stainless stell, the ultra-thin and sensitive food probe delivers readings to 0.1℃. The 12cm long probe enable a deep reach into the center of food without burning your skin. And open the probe to turn on, fold the probe to turn off. In addition, no matter how your lighting conditions are, the backlight screen allowing you easy to read the temperature

Versatile Temperature Range: With a wide temperature range of -50°C to 300°C (-58°F to 572°F), our meat thermometer probe serves you for almost all culinary occasions: Steak, BBQ, Jam or Icy beer, from blazing hot to freezing cold. The temperature guidelines on the package help you get the desired doneness of your food. Available in both Celsius and Fahrenheit reading, press the ‘℃/℉’button for 3 seconds to switch

Powerful Functionality & Durable: The ultra-thin anti-slip grip design makes this cooking thermometer easy to maneuver. With MAX/MIN temperature record, you can check the max or min temperature during cooking. With a strong ABS plastic body, it can withstand accidental drops or other impact accidents. Perfect for indoor outdoor cooking, grilling, BBQ and so on

Easy to Storage & Excellent Servies: With built-in magnets and a large hanging hole, storing the thermometer on your refrigerator or oven or a hook is a breeze.You'll get 1X meat thermometers, 1 X AAA battery, 1 X temperature guideline, 1 X user manual. Any issues, please contact us without any hesitation, we will be more than happy to help you
description: Product Description Have you had enough of awful overcooked or undercooked food? Are you tired of waiting for your terrible, old-style thermometer to get a final reading? DOQAUS digital meat thermometer is the perfect solution to put an end to these problems and always ensure your foods are cooked like a pro! Ultra-Fast Response & High Accuracy Offers you a spectacular clarity when reading the temperature in the dark or in the middle of smoke! Previous page Next page 1 Ultra Fast Reading 2 Large Backlight Screen 3 ℃/℉ Switch& Hold Function 4 Max/Min Record 5 Easy to Storage Previous page Next page Ideal tool for cooking enthusiasts and home chefs alike 1 Meat 2 Baking 3 Frying 4 Making Candy 5 Soup How accurate can this meat thermometer be? This thermometer is accurate to ±1 degree What temperature can this food thermometer measure? It can measure temperatures ranging from -50°C to 300°C (-58°F to 572°F) How long does it take to get a reading? You can get temperature in a little as 2-3 seconds Does this cooking thermometer use batteries?
